parsed.rationale: Waypoint D is located in a white area, which the caption identifies as not being mapped as woodland. The map shows that the highest elevations (7400 feet) are contained within the green woodland areas. Since Waypoint D is outside these high-elevation zones, it must be at a lower elevation than the peaks. The other waypoints (A, B, and C) are all situated within or near the green woodland areas, placing them at higher elevations than D.
